commands.review_summary:
The PR adds active-memory assistant-chatter rejection in `normalizeActiveSummary()` and regression coverage for normal and timeout-partial recall output.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main accepts arbitrary nonempty non-timeout recall text and both normal and timeout recovery paths can wrap it into hidden active-memory context. I did not rerun the live GLM scenario during this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is indicated; the remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real behavior proof and normal maintainer merge review.

target.title: fix(memory): reject active-memory assistant chatter
target.body:
Fixes #84034

## Summary
- Reject obvious assistant chatter, clarification boilerplate, and model/date/time help text in `active-memory` summary normalization.
- Apply the filter at `normalizeActiveSummary()` so both normal recall output and timeout partial transcript recovery fail closed before prompt injection.
- Add regressions for Chinese current-model/help chatter in timeout recovery, English/Chinese assistant-chatter rejection, and a legitimate memory summary that contains similar wording but should still be preserved.

## Verification
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --write --threads=1 extensions/active-memory/index.ts extensions/active-memory/index.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/active-memory/index.test.ts` passed: 1 file, 128 tests
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: active-memory recall output that is assistant chatter, model/date/time boilerplate, or generic clarification/help text is no longer accepted as memory context and will not be injected into `<active_memory_plugin>`.
Real environment tested: local source checkout on macOS using the repo Vitest node wrapper.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/active-memory/index.test.ts`
Evidence after fix: regression coverage includes a timed-out assistant transcript with Chinese current-model/help chatter, direct English and Chinese assistant-chatter summary rejection, and a legitimate summary containing "please provide more details" that is preserved.
Observed result after fix: `Test Files 1 passed (1)`, `Tests 128 passed (128)`.
What was not tested: broad changed gates/full extension suite; local `gh` auth is invalid, so PR creation used the GitHub connector rather than `gh pr create`.
